name: terraclimate-root
description: TerraClimate - Serverless Precision Agricultural Dashboard & Caching Telemetry

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix infra
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:scanner"
scripts.deploy:infra: cd infra && npx cdk deploy --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:infra && npm run deploy:frontend
